verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Nisi quia Dominus erat in nobis,  dicat nunc Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲל֗וֹת לְדָ֫וִ֥ד לוּלֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה שֶׁהָ֣יָה לָ֑נוּ יֹאמַר־נָ֝֗א יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: A gradual canticle. If it had not been that the Lord was with us, let Israel now say:
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin veisu korkeimmassa Kuorissa. Ellei Herra olisi meidän kanssamme, niin sanokaan Israel:
verses.king_james: If it had not been the Lord who was on our side, now may Israel say;

verses.latin_vulgate: nisi quia Dominus erat in nobis :  cum exsurgerent homines in nos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לוּלֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה שֶׁהָ֣יָה לָ֑נוּ בְּק֖וּם עָלֵ֣ינוּ אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If it had not been that the Lord was with us, When men rose up against us,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ellei Herra olisi meidän kanssamme, koska ihmiset karkaavat meitä vastaan,
verses.king_james: If it had not been the Lord who was on our side, when men rose up against us:

verses.latin_vulgate: forte vivos deglutissent nos ;  cum irasceretur furor eorum in nos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲ֭זַי חַיִּ֣ים בְּלָע֑וּנוּ בַּחֲר֖וֹת אַפָּ֣ם בָּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Perhaps they had swallowed us up alive. When their fury was enkindled against us,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he nielisivät meidät elävältä, kuin heidän vihansa julmistuu meidän päällemme;
verses.king_james: Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath was kindled against us:

verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲ֭זַי הַמַּ֣יִם שְׁטָפ֑וּנוּ נַ֝֗חְלָה עָבַ֥ר עַל־נַפְשֵֽׁנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Perhaps the waters had swallowed us up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vesi meitä upottais: kosket kävisivät sieluimme ylitse:
verses.king_james: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul:

verses.latin_vulgate: torrentem pertransivit anima nostra ;  forsitan pertransisset anima nostra  aquam intolerabilem.
verses.douay_rheims: Our soul hath passed through a torrent: perhaps our soul had passed through a water insupportable.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ylpiät veden aallot kävisivät sielumme ylitse.
verses.king_james: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus, qui non dedit nos  in captionem dentibus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֥וּךְ יְהֹוָ֑ה שֶׁלֹּ֥א נְתָנָ֥נוּ טֶ֝֗רֶף לְשִׁנֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord, who hath not given us to be a prey to their teeth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra, joka ei meitä anna raatelukseksi heidän hampaillensa!
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anima nostra sicut passer erepta est  de laqueo venantium ;  laqueus contritus est,  et nos liberati sumus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַפְשֵׁ֗נוּ כְּצִפּ֥וֹר נִמְלְטָה֮ מִפַּ֢ח י֫וֹקְשִׁ֥ים הַפַּ֥ח נִשְׁבָּ֗ר וַאֲנַ֥חְנוּ נִמְלָֽטְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Our soul hath been delivered as a sparrow out of the snare of the fowlers. The snare is broken, and we are delivered.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meidän sielumme pääsi niinkuin lintu lintumiehen paulasta. Paula on särjetty, ja me olemme päästetyt.
verses.king_james: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we are escaped.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjutorium nostrum in nomine Domini,  qui fecit cælum et terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֶ֭זְרֵנוּ בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Our help is in the name of the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meidän apumme on Herran nimessä, joka taivaan ja maan tehnyt on.
verses.king_james: Our help is in the name of the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
